findings.title: Plant Outage Data
findings.summary: NRG reported outage data incorrectly either in the Generator Availability Data System (GADS) or when reporting the outage data to the relevant RTO/ISO. Some regions use GADS data to develop reserve requirements for purchasing in the capacity market. Therefore, accurate and complete data must be gathered to understand unit life cycle performance and obtain a complete historical assessment.
